RuntimeBuilder.description: Builder for constructing Runtime with custom config

DriverType.description: Supported I/O driver types (IoUring, Epoll, Kqueue)

SchedulerHandle.description: Handle to a scheduler worker thread

JoinHandle.description: Handle to a spawned async task result

JoinError.description: Error from joining a failed task

SendError.description: Error when sending to a closed channel

RecvError.description: Error when receiving from a closed channel

SelectTwoOutput.description: Result of selecting from two channels

SelectMultipleOutput.description: Result of selecting from multiple channels

constants.spawn: fn: spawn an async task on the runtime
constants.sleep: fn: sleep for a given Duration
constants.sleep_until: fn: sleep until a given Instant
constants.bounded: fn: create a bounded MPSC channel
constants.unbounded: fn: create an unbounded MPSC channel
constants.select_two: fn: select from two channel operations
constants.select_multiple: fn: select from multiple channel operations
constants.gen_task_id: fn: generate a unique task ID

Bean.description: Core bean trait for IoC container entries

BeanDefinition.description: Metadata definition for a managed bean

BeanFactory.description: Factory trait for creating and managing beans

ApplicationContext.description: Central IoC container and application context

handler.description: Proc-macro: mark a function as HTTP handler

controller.description: Proc-macro: mark struct as web controller

service.description: Proc-macro: mark struct as service bean

repository.description: Proc-macro: mark struct as repository bean

component.description: Proc-macro: mark struct as generic component

scheduled.description: Proc-macro: mark method as scheduled task

async_fn.description: Proc-macro: mark method as async execution

configuration_properties.description: Proc-macro: bind external config to struct

nexus-http.springEquivalent: Spring Web / Spring WebFlux / Spring MVC

Server.description: HTTP server with binding and serving

Request.description: HTTP request with method, headers, body

Method.description: HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, etc.)

Router.description: HTTP request router with path parameters

constants.export_to_excel: fn: export data to Excel bytes

ToSql.description: Convert Rust type to SQL literal

PartTree.description: Parsed part tree from method name

constants.row_mapper: fn: create a RowMapper from closure

Entity.description: Proc-macro: mark struct as JPA entity

Id.description: Proc-macro: mark field as primary key

aspect.description: Proc-macro: mark struct as AOP aspect

EventListener.description: Proc-macro: mark method as event listener

nexus-kafka.springEquivalent: Spring Kafka / Spring for Apache Kafka

nexus-observability.springEquivalent: Spring Boot Actuator Metrics / Micrometer Tracing

nexus-cloud.springEquivalent: Spring Cloud (Discovery, Config, Gateway, Feign, LB)

nexus-agent.springEquivalent: Spring AI Agents (ReAct, Chain, Router patterns)

shell_component.description: Proc-macro: mark struct as shell component

shell_method.description: Proc-macro: mark method as shell command
